title: Offer Evaluation, Compensation, Negotiation, and Decision Quality · Opportunity Brief: Decision Record
summary: A verbal offer creates urgency while base pay, equity, benefits, schedule, location, probation, intellectual property, contingencies, and role expectations remain unclear. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the decision record increment in evidence-based offer decision model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and…
objectives: Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision.
Make a respectful prioritized counterproposal grounded in role value, evidence, market range, alternatives, and non-salary options.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record
steps.instruction:
theory case — A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Decision Record contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision. For Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record, keep Decision Record connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. hints: For Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Decision Record precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. For Predict Decision Record · Theory Decision Record, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: Accepting quickly demonstrates commitment and protects the offer.

options.text: Accepting quickly demonstrates commitment and protects the offer. That claim fails the predict decision record evidence boundary for Decision Record.

For predict decision record, apply Decision Record without its stated preconditions, omit the evidence-based offer decision model trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Decision Record for evidence-based offer decision model.

Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Decision Record while producing evidence-based offer decision model.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A verbal offer creates urgency while level, manager, total compensation, contingencies, schedule, intellectual property terms, and decision time remain unclear. The worked example variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision. A defensible solution applies Decision Record, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-based offer decision model.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-decision-record — Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-decision-record
decision-evidence: Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Accepting quickly demonstrates commitment and protects the offer. This fails the Decision Record contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Document benefits, risks, unknowns, pressure, advice boundaries, decline conditions, acceptance terms, and the learner-owned reasoned decision.
